public_training_support_route.value: Luxembourg has a public company-training co-financing route with 15% base support, and salary-cost weighting can rise to 35% for eligible participants.

workforce_context.value: In 2024 Luxembourg had 489,000 employees, and 47% were cross-border workers.

value: The uniqueness claim is false; public specialist and company-tailored French substitutes already exist.
The public co-financing route does not by itself prove this exact course is eligible.
The rounded 228k-230k worker count should not replace the raw official 489k / 47% figures.
All proposed vertical variants are not publicly proven as launch-ready.
CEFR progress reports and recordings are not externally verified as a buyer proof standard.

target_audience_summary.value: Luxembourg employers and cross-border teams that need workplace French beyond generic classroom content.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Reasonable synthesis, but still positioning rather than a default dashboard fact.

market_evidence_summary.omission_reason: Derived SEMrush market-evidence layer for prioritization and further research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into route-safe product language.
